indicators.name: absence of cooking appliances
indicators.rationale: No stove, oven, or microwave is visible, making it impossible to cook in this space.

indicators.name: absence of water fixture
indicators.rationale: No sink is present, which is essential for food preparation and kitchen hygiene.

indicators.name: soft seating furniture
indicators.rationale: A comfortable chair is present, but it is not suitable for cooking.

indicators.name: absence of hard prep surfaces
indicators.rationale: No countertop or hard washable work surface is present, which is required for all food preparation tasks.

indicators.name: wall-mounted widescreen TV
indicators.rationale: Entertainment media without any cooking infrastructure confirms this as a living room, not a kitchen.

reasoning_summary: This indoor scene is completely unsuitable for daily cooking. There are no cooking appliances, no sink, no hard prep surfaces, and the presence of soft seating furniture makes it impossible to use this space for cooking.
